Nonstress Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a nonstress test? 
A nonstress test (NST) is a safe and painless test given during pregnancy . The test measures the heart rate of your developing baby as the baby moves or when you have contractions in your uterus. Your uterus is the place where your baby grows during pregnancy.
In most healthy babies, the heart rate, also known as the fetal heart rate, increases during movement. If y
